file_name: Arivazhagan et al. - 2022 - Analysis of skin cancer and patient healthcare using data mining techniques.json

did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper proposes an Enhanced Image Analysis Technique (EIAT) for skin cancer detection and classification. It explicitly states the use of deep learning techniques and compares the proposed method against existing models including Multiclass Skin Diseases Classification (MCSDC), Decision Support System for Detection and Classification (DSSDC), Automatic Skin Cancer Detection (ASCD), and Skin Lesion Classification using Convolutional Neural Network (SLCNN). The results section provides accuracy metrics for these AI-based classification tasks.

is_this_paper_a_review_paper_or_a_resear.details: The title of the article explicitly states 'Review Article' (Chunk 0). Additionally, the paper structure includes a 'Literature Review' section (Chunk 2) and the content primarily summarizes existing methods, causes, and treatments for skin cancer rather than presenting original experimental results from a new study.

non_compliance_reason: The paper is a review, survey, or meta-analysis rather than an original research paper.
